item.description:
🍎 `iData v0.1.3` focuses on UI consistency and a more polished native shell.
- makes the side-by-side welcome cards render at consistent heights - redesigns Preferences into a glass-style settings panel with clearer runtime and update sections - fixes Preferences window sizing so the updates controls are fully visible - keeps the embedded `VisiData` workflow, recent pinning, in-app help, and Sparkle update path from `v0.1.2`
